category_sources: source_facts.description says DOSBox-X provides accurate emulation and wide testing; official wiki describes DOSBox-X as a cross-platform DOS emulator based on DOSBox.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official DOSBox-X wiki identify the project as DOSBox-X.
docs_sources: Official DOSBox-X website provides the project wiki documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/joncampbell123/dosbox-x, so repo lookup was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.homepage, and official wiki support DOS/x86 emulation and cross-platform retro-computing tags.
